lines.speaker: Witchaven villager
lines.text: What have you got to be so cheerful about?

lines.speaker: Witchaven villager
lines.text: Ha! Try worrying about how you feed a family with no job. Then tell me how nice the day is!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Okay, I guess I've caught you at a bad time. Goodbye.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Are you okay? You seem a bit preoccupied.

lines.speaker: Witchaven villager
lines.text: It's nothing stranger. No need to concern yourself.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: What do you need it for?

lines.speaker: Witchaven villager
lines.text: For a poor unemployed fisherman what needs to eat.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Why don't you just fish for some food?

lines.speaker: Witchaven villager
lines.text: Can you believe they did this to us?

lines.speaker: Witchaven villager
lines.text: I mean, what did they think would happen?

lines.speaker: Witchaven villager
lines.text: Building that whacking great Fishing Platform just off the coast.

lines.speaker: Witchaven villager
lines.text: Dratted thing stole all of our trade.

lines.speaker: Witchaven villager
lines.text: I'm sorry, I'm too angry to speak right now. Goodbye

lines.speaker: Witchaven villager
lines.text: With our nets and gear we're faring,

lines.speaker: Witchaven villager
lines.text: On the wild and wasteful ocean,

lines.speaker: Witchaven villager
lines.text: It's there on the deep that we harvest and reap our bread,

lines.speaker: Witchaven villager
lines.text: As we hunt the bonny shoals of herring.

lines.speaker: Witchaven villager
lines.text: Aye lad, and sing it every day we did.

lines.speaker: Witchaven villager
lines.text: 'Till the Fishing Platform came and ruined everything.

lines.speaker: Witchaven villager
lines.text: No need lad, it not be your fault.

lines.speaker: Witchaven villager
lines.text: Ye mariners all, as ye pass by,

lines.speaker: Witchaven villager
lines.text: Come in and drink if you are dry,

lines.speaker: Witchaven villager
lines.text: Come spend, me lads, your money brisk,

lines.speaker: Witchaven villager
lines.text: And pop your nose in a jug of this.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: You're not fooling anyone you know.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: It was an accide... Killed who?

lines.speaker: Witchaven villager
lines.text: Our Prince, you killed our Prince.

lines.speaker: Witchaven villager
lines.text: Do not worry, soon your regret will be gone.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: If you think you will get to me...
